summary: Completed testing of new title type and status filter functionality for AutoFlip Intelligence car flipper app. All backend APIs and frontend filter dropdowns working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/listings?brand_type=rebuilt - returns rebuilt title listings (works, 0 currently in DB)
Frontend: brand-type-filter dropdown exists with correct test-id
Frontend: brand-type-filter has options: All Titles, Salvage, Clean, Rebuilt
Frontend: status-filter dropdown exists with correct test-id
Frontend: status-filter has options: All Statuses, For Sale, Coming Soon
Frontend: Selecting 'Salvage' filters listings to show only salvage (14 results shown)
Frontend: Selecting 'Coming Soon' filters listings to show only coming soon (15 results shown)
Frontend: Combined filters work correctly (Salvage + Coming Soon = 1 result)
Frontend: Clean filter shows 50 results correctly
Frontend: For Sale filter shows 64 results correctly
All filter parameters correctly passed from frontend to backend API
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing scraped listings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter tests created in /app/backend/tests/test_filters.py covering brand_type (salvage/clean/rebuilt) and status (for_sale/coming_soon) filters. All 12 pytest tests pass. Frontend filter dropdowns have data-testid attributes: brand-type-filter and status-filter. Current counts: Salvage=14, Clean=50, For Sale=64, Coming Soon=15.
